title: Checking Is Running Low
prompt: Your checking account is getting low while a bill is coming up.

choices.label: Move $15 from savings
choices.ledger_note: Moved money to protect the bill.

choices.label: Cut wants and wait
choices.ledger_note: Cut wants to avoid a transfer.

choices.label: Ignore it and hope it works out
choices.ledger_note: Ignored the warning and risked fees.

title: Cash Gift Arrives
prompt: You receive unexpected gift money.

choices.label: Save all $20
choices.ledger_note: Saved the full gift amount.

choices.label: Save $10 and spend $10
choices.ledger_note: Split the gift between saving and spending.

choices.label: Spend the full $20
choices.ledger_note: Kept the full gift for spending.

title: Subscription Renewal Hits
prompt: A subscription renewal hits before you expected it.

choices.label: Keep it and pay $11
choices.ledger_note: Paid a subscription renewal.

choices.label: Cancel it and stop the leak
choices.ledger_note: Canceled the subscription before it kept draining money.

choices.label: Cover it by moving $11 from savings
choices.ledger_note: Moved savings to cover the renewal.

title: HYSA Bonus Opportunity
prompt: Your bank is offering a small reward if you save consistently.

choices.label: Add $10 to savings
choices.ledger_note: Added $10 to savings for the bonus path.

choices.label: Wait and keep cash free
choices.ledger_note: Kept your cash free for now.

choices.label: Spend the $10 instead
choices.ledger_note: Skipped the saving chance and spent instead.

title: Bill Due Tomorrow
prompt: A bill is due tomorrow and you are not ready.

choices.label: Pay the bill now
choices.ledger_note: Paid the bill on time.

choices.label: Pay part and make a plan
choices.ledger_note: Paid part and built a quick plan.

choices.label: Miss it and deal with the fee later
choices.ledger_note: Missed the bill and invited a late fee.

title: Tool Upgrade Savings
prompt: You are thinking about saving toward a better tool or upgrade.

choices.label: Save $15 toward it
choices.ledger_note: Saved money toward a future upgrade.

choices.label: Buy a small cheap fix for $6

choices.label: Ignore the plan completely
choices.ledger_note: Dropped the saving goal for now.

title: Lock or Keep Liquid
prompt: You can lock money into a CD or keep it flexible.

choices.label: Lock $20 for future growth
choices.ledger_note: Locked money into a CD for future growth.

choices.label: Keep the money in savings
choices.ledger_note: Kept your money available in savings.

choices.label: Keep it for spending instead
choices.ledger_note: Kept the money free to spend.

title: Friends Upgrading Their Stuff
prompt: Friends are upgrading their stuff and you feel pressure too.

choices.label: Buy now for $25
choices.ledger_note: Spent because of comparison pressure.

choices.label: Start a savings goal first
choices.ledger_note: Started a savings goal instead of rushing.

choices.label: Skip the upgrade
choices.ledger_note: Skipped the upgrade and stayed on plan.

title: Bank Fee Notice
prompt: You notice a bank fee that could hit if you are careless.

choices.label: Fix the issue now
choices.ledger_note: Handled the issue before it turned into a fee.

choices.label: Transfer $8 to stay above the minimum
choices.ledger_note: Made a small transfer to avoid the fee.

choices.label: Ignore the notice
choices.ledger_note: Ignored the notice and got hit.

title: Emergency Fund Choice
prompt: You have a chance to build a small emergency fund.

choices.label: Put $12 into emergency savings
choices.ledger_note: Started or added to your emergency fund.

choices.label: Put in $6 and keep $6 flexible
